hooks.command: CMD=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); if ! echo "$CMD" | grep -q 'git commit'; then exit 0; fi; STAGED=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null || echo ''); HAS_CODE=$(echo "$STAGED" | grep -c '^packages/' || true); HAS_ARCH=$(echo "$STAGED" | grep -c '^docs/architecture/' || true); HAS_README=$(echo "$STAGED" | grep -c '^README.md' || true); HAS_README_ZH=$(echo "$STAGED" | grep -c '^README.zh-CN.md' || true); HAS_DOCS=$((HAS_ARCH + HAS_README + HAS_README_ZH)); if [ "$HAS_CODE" -gt 0 ] && [ "$HAS_DOCS" -eq 0 ]; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"⚠️ Code changes under packages/ detected but no documentation staged. Check if docs/architecture/, README.md, or README.zh-CN.md need updates per CLAUDE.md rules."}'; else exit 0; fi
